---
title: "Development and Structure"
self-contained: true
format: html
---
### Project Diagram

This diagram is a flowchart that represents the structure and proccesses involved in the development of our project.

<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/mermaid@10/dist/mermaid.min.js"></script> 
   <!-- Initialize Mermaid -->
   <script>
       // Initialize Mermaid
       mermaid.initialize({
       });
   </script>
```{mermaid}

flowchart TB
classDef democratcolour fill:#FFB6C1,stroke:#333,stroke-width:4px
classDef republicancolour fill:#FFB6C1,stroke:#333,stroke-width:4px
subgraph Brainstorming

A[Start] --> B(Uber Eats)
class B democratcolour
class A republicancolour
A  --> H(Sociopolitical buzzwords)
class H democratcolour
   
H  --> C(Twitter API)

B  --> G(Issue: No public API)
class G republicancolour

class C republicancolour
A --> R(NASA)
class R democratcolour
R --> S(Issue: Data too clean)
class S republicancolour
C  --> D(Issue: limit of 1500 tweets to scrape)
class D democratcolour
end
subgraph Reddit
 style Reddit fill:#ADD8E6,stroke:#333,stroke-width:4px
H  --> I(Reddit API)
I  --> J(Scrape state subreddits)
J --> Y(Filter out stopwords)
Y  --> K(Calculate topics for each state)
K --> T[(DATAFRAME)]
T --> U[list of states, top 3 topics, upvote ratio and comments]

U -->|e.g|V((r/NewYork))
U -->|e.g|W((r/Florida))
U --> X{JSON or CSV}
end 



subgraph Exploratory_Anaysis

T --> AA[Interactive map]
AA --> CC[languages used: CSS, HTML, Java]
T --> UU[graphs for each state:]
class UU republicancolour
UU --> VV[top 10 topics]
UU --> WW[topic clustering]
UU --> XX[similarity matrix]
UU --> YY[interstate topic similarity]
end
```
